overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the dense futuristic metropolis of Night City. The character travels along shaded sidewalks past neon-lit buildings, crosses a busy sunlit intersection, and continues through a bustling downtown corridor lined with palm trees and towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded commercial sidewalk with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shaded sidewalk, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading 'FOURTH WALL' on building facade
steam rising from street vent against building backdrop
tall dark building wall with horizontal neon strips
orange metal railings lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a shaded urban sidewalk bordered by a dark building on the right and a busy street on the left. Neon signs including a prominent 'FOURTH WALL' sign illuminate the left side while steam rises from a street vent ahead. Sparse pedestrians and occasional futuristic vehicles populate the scene.

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, allowing pedestrian crossing
character steps out of building shadow into bright direct sunlight while crossing

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the intersection alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic taxi waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall pole with traffic signals showing green walk indicator
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
large vertical digital billboard with purple and yellow graphics

segments.scene_description: The character exits the shaded corridor into a bright sunlit intersection, crossing the street as the traffic light turns green. The view opens up to reveal towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees on the opposite side. Other pedestrians cross alongside, and futuristic vehicles wait at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit downtown sidewalk with palm trees and digital signage

events.description: pedestrian density increases as character approaches a busy commercial area

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sunlit sidewalk past palm trees and various pedestrians

entered.detail: yellow elevated pedestrian walkway crossing above the street ahead
row of parked cyberpunk-style cars along the street curb

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees and orange safety railings. The street is busy with futuristic traffic and pedestrians. Large digital billboards cover the surrounding skyscrapers, and a pedestrian overpass becomes visible in the distance as the character continues through the dense urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim, neon-lit urban corridor into a bright, expansive downtown intersection. It begins on a shaded sidewalk bordered by a dark building, where steam rises from street vents and a prominent Fourth Wall neon sign glows against the shadows. As the character moves forward, the scene opens abruptly into a sun-drenched intersection, shifting the lighting from moody artificial tones to brilliant daylight as the camera crosses the street toward towering glass skyscrapers and palm trees. The view then expands further along a sunlit promenade lined with orange safety railings and bustling futuristic traffic. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the dense urban canyon, passing under massive digital billboards that wrap around the skyscrapers before heading toward a distant pedestrian overpass.
